description: Remove all task-to-card linking functionality from TaskPanel.jsx and App.jsx while keeping the task system (create, edit, delete, complete, persist) fully functional.
steps: In src/TaskPanel.jsx: Remove `cardTaskLinks`, `nodes`, and `onLocateCard` from the component props destructuring (line 28-30).
In src/TaskPanel.jsx: Remove the `getLinkedCard` helper function (lines 53-56).
In src/TaskPanel.jsx: Remove the `Circle` icon import since it is only used for linked card chips (line 4).
In src/TaskPanel.jsx: In `renderListRow`, remove the `const linkedCard = getLinkedCard(task.id);` variable and the entire 'Linked Card Chip' button block (lines 159-170 approximately).
In src/TaskPanel.jsx: In `renderCardView`, remove the `const linkedCard = getLinkedCard(task.id);` variable and the linked card button block (lines 361-365 approximately).
In src/App.jsx: Remove the `const [cardTaskLinks, setCardTaskLinks] = useState([]);` state declaration (line 406).
In src/App.jsx: Remove the `addTaskFromCard` function entirely (lines 3003-3021). It creates a task from a card and adds a cardTaskLink.
In src/App.jsx: Remove the `addTaskFromCardRef` useRef and its useEffect (lines 3168-3169).
In src/App.jsx: Remove the `locateCard` function entirely (lines 3081-3097).
In src/App.jsx: In the `deleteTask` function, remove the line `setCardTaskLinks(prev => prev.filter(l => l.taskId !== taskId));` (only remove the cardTaskLinks line, keep the rest of deleteTask).

In src/App.jsx: In the Shift+T keyboard handler useEffect (lines 1366-1385), remove the Shift+T branch that calls `addTaskFromCardRef.current(focusedNodeId)`. Keep the plain T handler that toggles the task panel.
In src/App.jsx: In the node context menu UI, remove the 'Add to Tasks' button that calls `addTaskFromCard(nodeContextMenu.nodeId)` (around line 5240).
In src/App.jsx: In the TaskPanel component usage (around line 5537), remove the `cardTaskLinks`, `nodes`, and `onLocateCard` props.
In src/App.jsx: In the `exportData` function, remove `cardTaskLinks` from the exported data object (line 2099).
In src/App.jsx: In the `handleImport` function, remove the block that imports `cardTaskLinks` (the `if (Array.isArray(importedData.cardTaskLinks)...)` block around line 2193).
In src/App.jsx: In the auto-save useEffect, remove `cardTaskLinks` from the project state that gets saved (line 868) and from the dependency array (line 880).
In src/App.jsx: In the initialization useEffect, remove the line `if (activeProj.cardTaskLinks) setCardTaskLinks(activeProj.cardTaskLinks);` (line 699).
In src/App.jsx: In the `importAllData` function, remove the `setCardTaskLinks(defaultProj.cardTaskLinks || []);` line (around line 2253).
In src/App.jsx: In both project switching functions (around lines 1793 and 1843), remove the `setCardTaskLinks(target.cardTaskLinks || []);` lines.

In src/App.jsx: Remove the `CheckSquare` import from lucide-react ONLY if it is not used elsewhere. (Check first - it is likely used for the task panel toggle button in the toolbar, so it should be kept.)
After all removals, verify no remaining references to `cardTaskLinks`, `addTaskFromCard`, `getLinkedCard`, `locateCard`, or `onLocateCard` exist in the codebase.
acceptance_criteria: Running `npm run build` succeeds with no errors
No references to `cardTaskLinks`, `addTaskFromCard`, `getLinkedCard`, `locateCard`, or `onLocateCard` remain in source files
The TaskPanel component still renders correctly with its remaining props (tasks, taskGroups, showTaskPanel, taskPanelMode, etc.)
Task CRUD operations (create via standalone mechanism, edit, delete, complete) remain intact
Task persistence to localStorage still works (tasks and taskGroups are still saved)
Import/export still works for tasks and taskGroups (just without cardTaskLinks)
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/mind-map && npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
Run `grep -rn 'cardTaskLinks\|addTaskFromCard\|getLinkedCard\|onLocateCard' src/` and confirm no matches
